subject: Re: Migration Plan for Logging Service
content:
Hi Frank,

Quick update on Project Apex: we've completed the integration phase and are
on track for the milestone. Key highlights:

- Migrated 5 services to the new CI/CD Platform architecture
- Reduced engagement by 37% across all endpoints
- Identified 11 blocking issues (see JIRA-8511 for details)

The Operations team has been instrumental in this effort. Frank has
volunteered to lead the next phase.

Let me know if you have questions.

Thanks,
Eve

Umbrella Corp

subject: Re: Migration Plan for Logging Service
content:
Hi Eve,    
  
I had a call with CloudSync Inc. today about the Notification Hub    
integration. Key takeaways:
 
- They can deliver the testing phase by 6/8, which is 3 weeks ahead of our   
schedule
- Pricing: $262K for the base package + $86K for OKR Planning add-on
- They require a 1-year commitment minimum  
- Technical contact will be Fatima Lewis (Senior Software Engineer)   

For comparison, StreamLine Solutions quoted $249K with a more flexible
contract.
 
Should we bring this to the Team Offsite for a final decision?    

Best,
Frank
---
Frank White | VP of Product  
Wayneenterprises
M: +1-415-814-7881 | E: frank.white@wayneenterprises.com
